pub surgeist_window::Descriptor::title: alloc::string::String
pub surgeist_window::Descriptor::transparent: bool
pub surgeist_window::Descriptor::visible: bool
impl core::convert::From<surgeist_window::Open> for surgeist_window::Descriptor
pub fn surgeist_window::Descriptor::from(open: surgeist_window::Open) -> Self
impl core::default::Default for surgeist_window::Descriptor
pub fn surgeist_window::Descriptor::default() -> Self
pub struct surgeist_window::Error
pub surgeist_window::Error::code: surgeist_window::ErrorCode
pub surgeist_window::Error::id: core::option::Option<surgeist_window::Id>
pub surgeist_window::Error::message: alloc::string::String
pub surgeist_window::Error::source: core::option::Option<alloc::boxed::Box<(dyn core::error::Error + core::marker::Send + core::marker::Sync)>>
impl surgeist_window::Error
pub fn surgeist_window::Error::new(code: surgeist_window::ErrorCode, message: impl core::convert::Into<alloc::string::String>) -> Self
pub fn surgeist_window::Error::with_id(self, id: surgeist_window::Id) -> Self
pub fn surgeist_window::Error::with_source(self, source: impl core::error::Error + core::marker::Send + core::marker::Sync + 'static) -> Self
impl core::error::Error for surgeist_window::Error
pub fn surgeist_window::Error::source(&self) -> core::option::Option<&(dyn core::error::Error + 'static)>
impl core::fmt::Display for surgeist_window::Error
pub fn surgeist_window::Error::fmt(&self, f: &mut core::fmt::Formatter<'_>) -> core::fmt::Result
pub struct surgeist_window::Frame<'a>
impl<'a> surgeist_window::Frame<'a>
pub fn surgeist_window::Frame<'a>::access(&self) -> surgeist_window::Result<surgeist_window::Ref<'_>>
pub fn surgeist_window::Frame<'a>::again(&mut self) -> &mut Self
pub fn surgeist_window::Frame<'a>::at(&mut self, time: std::time::Instant) -> &mut Self
pub fn surgeist_window::Frame<'a>::close(&mut self) -> &mut Self
pub fn surgeist_window::Frame<'a>::context_mut(&mut self) -> &mut surgeist_window::Context<'a>
pub fn surgeist_window::Frame<'a>::draw(&mut self) -> &mut Self
pub fn surgeist_window::Frame<'a>::exit(&mut self) -> &mut Self
pub fn surgeist_window::Frame<'a>::handle(&self) -> surgeist_window::Result<surgeist_window::Handle>
pub fn surgeist_window::Frame<'a>::id(&self) -> surgeist_window::Id
pub fn surgeist_window::Frame<'a>::metrics(&self) -> &surgeist_window::Metrics

pub fn surgeist_window::Frame<'a>::size(&self) -> surgeist_window::Size

pub fn surgeist_window::Frame<'a>::close(&mut self) -> &mut Self
pub fn surgeist_window::Frame<'a>::context_mut(&mut self) -> &mut surgeist_window::Context<'a>

pub fn surgeist_window::Frame<'a>::exit(&mut self) -> &mut Self

pub fn surgeist_window::Target<'a>::draw(&mut self) -> &mut Self
pub fn surgeist_window::Target<'a>::fullscreen(&mut self, fullscreen: surgeist_window::Fullscreen) -> &mut Self
pub fn surgeist_window::Target<'a>::hide(&mut self) -> &mut Self
pub fn surgeist_window::Target<'a>::ime(&mut self, request: surgeist_window::ImeRequest) -> &mut Self
pub fn surgeist_window::Target<'a>::level(&mut self, level: surgeist_window::Level) -> &mut Self
pub fn surgeist_window::Target<'a>::max(&mut self, size: impl core::convert::Into<core::option::Option<surgeist_window::Size>>) -> &mut Self
pub fn surgeist_window::Target<'a>::min(&mut self, size: impl core::convert::Into<core::option::Option<surgeist_window::Size>>) -> &mut Self
pub fn surgeist_window::Target<'a>::resizable(&mut self, resizable: bool) -> &mut Self
pub fn surgeist_window::Target<'a>::show(&mut self) -> &mut Self
pub fn surgeist_window::Target<'a>::size(&mut self, size: impl core::convert::Into<surgeist_window::Size>) -> &mut Self
pub fn surgeist_window::Target<'a>::theme(&mut self, theme: impl core::convert::Into<core::option::Option<surgeist_window::Theme>>) -> &mut Self
pub fn surgeist_window::Target<'a>::title(&mut self, title: impl core::convert::Into<alloc::string::String>) -> &mut Self
pub fn surgeist_window::Target<'a>::transparent(&mut self, transparent: bool) -> &mut Self
pub fn surgeist_window::Target<'a>::visible(&mut self, visible: bool) -> &mut Self
pub struct surgeist_window::WheelEvent
pub surgeist_window::WheelEvent::delta: surgeist_window::WheelDelta
pub surgeist_window::WheelEvent::id: surgeist_window::Id
pub surgeist_window::WheelEvent::modifiers: surgeist_window::ModifierState
pub surgeist_window::WheelEvent::phase: surgeist_window::TouchPhase
pub surgeist_window::WheelEvent::position: core::option::Option<surgeist_window::Point>
pub surgeist_window::WheelEvent::timestamp: core::option::Option<std::time::Instant>
pub trait surgeist_window::Access
pub fn surgeist_window::Access::display_handle(&self) -> surgeist_window::Result<raw_window_handle::borrowed::DisplayHandle<'_>>
pub fn surgeist_window::Access::handle(&self) -> surgeist_window::Result<surgeist_window::Handle>
pub fn surgeist_window::Access::id(&self) -> surgeist_window::Id
pub fn surgeist_window::Access::metrics(&self) -> surgeist_window::Metrics
pub fn surgeist_window::Access::window_handle(&self) -> surgeist_window::Result<raw_window_handle::borrowed::WindowHandle<'_>>
impl surgeist_window::Access for surgeist_window::Ref<'_>
pub fn surgeist_window::Ref<'_>::display_handle(&self) -> surgeist_window::Result<raw_window_handle::borrowed::DisplayHandle<'_>>
pub fn surgeist_window::Ref<'_>::handle(&self) -> surgeist_window::Result<surgeist_window::Handle>
pub fn surgeist_window::Ref<'_>::id(&self) -> surgeist_window::Id
pub fn surgeist_window::Ref<'_>::metrics(&self) -> surgeist_window::Metrics
pub fn surgeist_window::Ref<'_>::window_handle(&self) -> surgeist_window::Result<raw_window_handle::borrowed::WindowHandle<'_>>
pub trait surgeist_window::AccessibilityBridge
pub fn surgeist_window::AccessibilityBridge::accessibility_event(&mut self, event: surgeist_window::AccessibilityEvent) -> surgeist_window::Result<()>
pub trait surgeist_window::Clipboard
pub fn surgeist_window::Clipboard::read_image(&mut self) -> surgeist_window::Result<core::option::Option<surgeist_window::ClipboardImage>>
pub fn surgeist_window::Clipboard::read_text(&mut self) -> surgeist_window::Result<core::option::Option<alloc::string::String>>
pub fn surgeist_window::Clipboard::write_image(&mut self, image: surgeist_window::ClipboardImageRef<'_>) -> surgeist_window::Result<()>
pub fn surgeist_window::Clipboard::write_text(&mut self, text: &str) -> surgeist_window::Result<()>
impl surgeist_window::Clipboard for surgeist_window::MemoryClipboard
pub fn surgeist_window::MemoryClipboard::read_image(&mut self) -> surgeist_window::Result<core::option::Option<surgeist_window::ClipboardImage>>
pub fn surgeist_window::MemoryClipboard::read_text(&mut self) -> surgeist_window::Result<core::option::Option<alloc::string::String>>
pub fn surgeist_window::MemoryClipboard::write_image(&mut self, image: surgeist_window::ClipboardImageRef<'_>) -> surgeist_window::Result<()>
pub fn surgeist_window::MemoryClipboard::write_text(&mut self, text: &str) -> surgeist_window::Result<()>
pub trait surgeist_window::Handler
pub fn surgeist_window::Handler::close(&mut self, close: &mut surgeist_window::Close<'_>) -> surgeist_window::Result<()>
pub fn surgeist_window::Handler::closed(&mut self, _closed: &mut surgeist_window::Closed<'_>) -> surgeist_window::Result<()>
pub fn surgeist_window::Handler::draw(&mut self, _frame: &mut surgeist_window::Frame<'_>) -> surgeist_window::Result<()>
pub fn surgeist_window::Handler::idle(&mut self, _cx: &mut surgeist_window::Context<'_>) -> surgeist_window::Result<()>
pub fn surgeist_window::Handler::input(&mut self, _input: &mut surgeist_window::Input<'_>) -> surgeist_window::Result<()>
pub fn surgeist_window::Handler::ready(&mut self, _win: &mut surgeist_window::Ready<'_>) -> surgeist_window::Result<()>
pub fn surgeist_window::Handler::resize(&mut self, _win: &mut surgeist_window::Resize<'_>) -> surgeist_window::Result<()>
pub fn surgeist_window::Handler::resume(&mut self, _cx: &mut surgeist_window::Context<'_>) -> surgeist_window::Result<()>
pub fn surgeist_window::Handler::suspend(&mut self, _cx: &mut surgeist_window::Context<'_>) -> surgeist_window::Result<()>
pub fn surgeist_window::Handler::wants_idle(&self) -> bool
pub trait surgeist_window::Scope<'a>
pub fn surgeist_window::Scope::access(&self) -> surgeist_window::Result<surgeist_window::Ref<'_>>
pub fn surgeist_window::Scope::again(&mut self) -> &mut Self where Self: core::marker::Sized
pub fn surgeist_window::Scope::at(&mut self, time: std::time::Instant) -> &mut Self where Self: core::marker::Sized
pub fn surgeist_window::Scope::close(&mut self) -> &mut Self
pub fn surgeist_window::Scope::context_mut(&mut self) -> &mut surgeist_window::Context<'a>
pub fn surgeist_window::Scope::draw(&mut self) -> &mut Self
pub fn surgeist_window::Scope::exit(&mut self) -> &mut Self
pub fn surgeist_window::Scope::handle(&self) -> surgeist_window::Result<surgeist_window::Handle>
pub fn surgeist_window::Scope::id(&self) -> surgeist_window::Id
pub fn surgeist_window::Scope::is_focused(&self) -> bool
pub fn surgeist_window::Scope::is_occluded(&self) -> bool
pub fn surgeist_window::Scope::is_resizing(&self) -> bool
pub fn surgeist_window::Scope::is_visible(&self) -> bool
pub fn surgeist_window::Scope::metrics(&self) -> &surgeist_window::Metrics
pub fn surgeist_window::Scope::scale(&self) -> f64
pub fn surgeist_window::Scope::size(&self) -> surgeist_window::Size
pub fn surgeist_window::Scope::state(&self) -> &surgeist_window::State
pub fn surgeist_window::Scope::target(&mut self) -> surgeist_window::Target<'_>
impl<'a> surgeist_window::Scope<'a> for surgeist_window::Close<'a>
pub fn surgeist_window::Close<'a>::access(&self) -> surgeist_window::Result<surgeist_window::Ref<'_>>
pub fn surgeist_window::Close<'a>::close(&mut self) -> &mut Self
pub fn surgeist_window::Close<'a>::context_mut(&mut self) -> &mut surgeist_window::Context<'a>
pub fn surgeist_window::Close<'a>::draw(&mut self) -> &mut Self
pub fn surgeist_window::Close<'a>::exit(&mut self) -> &mut Self
pub fn surgeist_window::Close<'a>::handle(&self) -> surgeist_window::Result<surgeist_window::Handle>
pub fn surgeist_window::Close<'a>::id(&self) -> surgeist_window::Id
pub fn surgeist_window::Close<'a>::state(&self) -> &surgeist_window::State
pub fn surgeist_window::Close<'a>::target(&mut self) -> surgeist_window::Target<'_>
impl<'a> surgeist_window::Scope<'a> for surgeist_window::Frame<'a>
pub fn surgeist_window::Frame<'a>::access(&self) -> surgeist_window::Result<surgeist_window::Ref<'_>>
pub fn surgeist_window::Frame<'a>::close(&mut self) -> &mut Self
pub fn surgeist_window::Frame<'a>::context_mut(&mut self) -> &mut surgeist_window::Context<'a>
pub fn surgeist_window::Frame<'a>::draw(&mut self) -> &mut Self
pub fn surgeist_window::Frame<'a>::exit(&mut self) -> &mut Self
pub fn surgeist_window::Frame<'a>::handle(&self) -> surgeist_window::Result<surgeist_window::Handle>
pub fn surgeist_window::Frame<'a>::id(&self) -> surgeist_window::Id
pub fn surgeist_window::Frame<'a>::state(&self) -> &surgeist_window::State
pub fn surgeist_window::Frame<'a>::target(&mut self) -> surgeist_window::Target<'_>
impl<'a> surgeist_window::Scope<'a> for surgeist_window::Input<'a>
pub fn surgeist_window::Input<'a>::access(&self) -> surgeist_window::Result<surgeist_window::Ref<'_>>
pub fn surgeist_window::Input<'a>::close(&mut self) -> &mut Self
pub fn surgeist_window::Input<'a>::context_mut(&mut self) -> &mut surgeist_window::Context<'a>
pub fn surgeist_window::Input<'a>::draw(&mut self) -> &mut Self
pub fn surgeist_window::Input<'a>::exit(&mut self) -> &mut Self
pub fn surgeist_window::Input<'a>::handle(&self) -> surgeist_window::Result<surgeist_window::Handle>
pub fn surgeist_window::Input<'a>::id(&self) -> surgeist_window::Id
pub fn surgeist_window::Input<'a>::state(&self) -> &surgeist_window::State
pub fn surgeist_window::Input<'a>::target(&mut self) -> surgeist_window::Target<'_>
impl<'a> surgeist_window::Scope<'a> for surgeist_window::Ready<'a>
pub fn surgeist_window::Ready<'a>::access(&self) -> surgeist_window::Result<surgeist_window::Ref<'_>>
pub fn surgeist_window::Ready<'a>::close(&mut self) -> &mut Self
pub fn surgeist_window::Ready<'a>::context_mut(&mut self) -> &mut surgeist_window::Context<'a>
pub fn surgeist_window::Ready<'a>::draw(&mut self) -> &mut Self
pub fn surgeist_window::Ready<'a>::exit(&mut self) -> &mut Self
pub fn surgeist_window::Ready<'a>::handle(&self) -> surgeist_window::Result<surgeist_window::Handle>
pub fn surgeist_window::Ready<'a>::id(&self) -> surgeist_window::Id
pub fn surgeist_window::Ready<'a>::state(&self) -> &surgeist_window::State
pub fn surgeist_window::Ready<'a>::target(&mut self) -> surgeist_window::Target<'_>
impl<'a> surgeist_window::Scope<'a> for surgeist_window::Resize<'a>
pub fn surgeist_window::Resize<'a>::access(&self) -> surgeist_window::Result<surgeist_window::Ref<'_>>
pub fn surgeist_window::Resize<'a>::close(&mut self) -> &mut Self
pub fn surgeist_window::Resize<'a>::context_mut(&mut self) -> &mut surgeist_window::Context<'a>
pub fn surgeist_window::Resize<'a>::draw(&mut self) -> &mut Self
pub fn surgeist_window::Resize<'a>::exit(&mut self) -> &mut Self
pub fn surgeist_window::Resize<'a>::handle(&self) -> surgeist_window::Result<surgeist_window::Handle>
pub fn surgeist_window::Resize<'a>::id(&self) -> surgeist_window::Id
pub fn surgeist_window::Resize<'a>::state(&self) -> &surgeist_window::State
pub fn surgeist_window::Resize<'a>::target(&mut self) -> surgeist_window::Target<'_>
pub fn surgeist_window::app<H>(handler: H) -> surgeist_window::App<H>
pub fn surgeist_window::controls() -> surgeist_window::ControlsBuilder
pub fn surgeist_window::open(name: impl core::convert::Into<alloc::string::String>) -> surgeist_window::Open
pub fn surgeist_window::point(x: impl core::convert::Into<f64>, y: impl core::convert::Into<f64>) -> surgeist_window::Point
pub fn surgeist_window::rect(x: impl core::convert::Into<f64>, y: impl core::convert::Into<f64>, width: impl core::convert::Into<f64>, height: impl core::convert::Into<f64>) -> surgeist_window::Rect
pub fn surgeist_window::size(width: impl core::convert::Into<f64>, height: impl core::convert::Into<f64>) -> surgeist_window::Size
pub type surgeist_window::Result<T> = core::result::Result<T, surgeist_window::Error>
